Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix nested session error when at/cron jobs inherit CLAUDECODE env var

When scheduling a task from within a Claude Code session, the CLAUDECODE
environment variable is inherited by at/cron jobs. Claude CLI refuses to
launch inside another session, causing all scheduled tasks to fail with
"cannot be launched inside another Claude Code session."

Unset CLAUDECODE in the helper script so scheduled tasks run as
independent sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add context guardian skill (#4)

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

JEF-79 JEF-86 JEF-88 JEF-102: bug fixes and polish (#16)

* JEF-86: feat: add image error fallback for Pokemon images

When a Pokemon image URL fails to load, show an inline SVG placeholder
(grey rounded box with '?' and 'No Image') instead of a broken image icon.
Uses e.target.onerror = null to prevent infinite error loops.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* JEF-88: feat: replace static loading text with animated spinner

Replace plain gray "Loading..." text in Dashboard and Comparison with
a spinning border circle (animate-spin) and pulsing text (animate-pulse),
using existing pokemon-blue/pokemon-border tokens.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* JEF-79: fix: normalize type names to title case for TYPE_COLORS lookup

The database stores Pokemon types in ALL CAPS (e.g. "GRASS", "POISON")
but TYPE_COLORS uses title case keys ("Grass", "Poison"), causing all
badge lookups to fall through to the #888 gray fallback.

Add getTypeColor() helper that normalizes to title case before lookup.
Replace all TYPE_COLORS[type] usages with getTypeColor(type).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* JEF-102: fix: align comparison header controls to bottom edge

The Pokemon 1/2 labels inside PokemonSelect made the select+random groups
taller than the swap button. items-center on the outer flex was centering
the swap button against the full label+input height, causing misalignment.

Change items-center to items-end on both the outer flex and inner
select+random flex groups so inputs, random buttons, and swap button
all align at the same baseline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: keep card header background as red/blue accentColor, not type color

Remove type-color-based headerBg logic added during JEF-79 fix.
Card headers should use the passed accentColor (red for P1, blue for P2)
rather than the Pokemon's primary type color.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(d2c): correct xsi:schemaLocation format in FinCEN XML

The schemaLocation attribute was using a single path
("www.fincen.gov/base/EFL_FBARXBatchSchema.xsd") instead of the
required namespace+schema pair separated by a space
("www.fincen.gov/base EFL_FBARXBatchSchema.xsd"). This matches the
format used in the known-good batch that received ACCEPTED ack on
2026-02-20.

commit.message:
feat(ops): SIGTERM graceful shutdown + deploy pipeline safety (#291, #292) (#312)

* feat(ops): add SIGTERM graceful shutdown with pipeline awareness (#291)

- Register SIGTERM/SIGINT handlers in lifespan that set a global
  shutdown_event and stop active scrape pipeline runs
- Add shutdown checks in enrichment Pass 1/Pass 2 batch loops
- Add shutdown checks between pipeline phases in scheduler jobs
- Expose pipeline status and shutdown state in /health endpoint
- Health returns 503 with status "shutting_down" when draining

The health endpoint now includes:
- pipeline: "idle" | "active (N run(s))" — for deploy safety (#292)
- shutdown: "in_progress" — when SIGTERM received

Closes #291

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address bot review feedback on PR #312

- health.py: use request.app.state.shutdown_event instead of importing
  from compgraph.main to avoid circular dependency risk
- enrichment/orchestrator.py: move shutdown_event import outside loop,
  track shutdown-interrupted runs as PARTIAL instead of SUCCESS
- deploy-ci.sh: remove stderr suppression (2>/dev/null) for better
  CI diagnostics, separate unknown status with explicit warning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address remaining bot review feedback on PR #312

- Include PipelineStatus.STOPPING in health endpoint active pipeline
  filter so deploy-ci.sh correctly waits during graceful shutdown
  (identified by Cursor)
- Register scrape orchestrator in _pipeline_orchestrators from
  scheduler pipeline_job so signal handler can stop scheduler-triggered
  runs (identified by Cursor)
- Persist shutdown error_summary to DB in enrichment run_pass1
  (identified by Cubic)
- Move shutdown_event import to top of pipeline_job function scope
  (addresses Gemini repeated-import feedback)
- Add _mock_db_session fixture to test_scheduler.py to prevent
  unit tests from hitting real DB during cleanup_stale_pending_runs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix flat-name collision bug and add parallel build support to gherkin convert

- Fix flat-name generation: use all path components (ec2/api -> ec2-api)
  instead of dropping the first (ec2/api -> api), which caused collisions
  when multiple subdirectories had identically-named files
- Replace sequential build-gherkin.ss with compile-one.ss that compiles
  a single module via --program mode, enabling make -j8 parallelism
- Generate per-module Makefile targets with dependency tracking from
  automatic cross-module import scanning
- Auto-generate internal import maps (:pkg/mod/path -> (pkg flat-name))
  and catch-all #f mapping for unmapped :std/* imports
- Add mod->flat-name helper and scan-internal-deps to DRY up code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Prove rebase_preserves_logEffect — zero sorries remaining

Close all 4 remaining sorry cases by establishing a double-insertion
equation via applyInsert_comm (Way A vs Way B), then applying
double_insertIdx_lt/gt/eq to determine the rebased position. The
equal-index tiebreaker cases use precedesIn_antisymm to eliminate
the wrong disjunct.

commit.message:
fix: handle /* */ block comments in SQL comparison parser

The SELECT expression parser only stripped -- line comments but not
/* */ block comments. Generated SQL uses /* TODO: ... */ which contain
commas, causing false expression splits. This fix eliminates all
"生成SQL列数不平衡" false positives (8 cases) and reduces SELECT
count mismatches from 10 to 2 (both are hand-written SQL bugs).

Results: 21/60 pass (unchanged), remaining diffs are now all genuine.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 23 luxury and sports car brands to vehicle search

Expands VEHICLE_DATA to include Porsche, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Lexus, Tesla, and 17 other popular makes. Fixes issue where searches for luxury/sports cars (e.g., "2008 Porsche Cayman") were failing with "Could not detect make" error.

Previously only supported 12 mainstream brands (Ford, Chevy, Toyota, etc.). Now supports 35+ makes covering luxury, sports, and additional mainstream vehicles.

Added brands: Porsche, BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Audi, Lexus, Tesla, Mazda, Volkswagen, Volvo, Acura, Infiniti, Cadillac, Lincoln, Buick, Chrysler, Land Rover, Jaguar, Alfa Romeo, Maserati, Genesis, Mini, Mitsubishi

commit.message:
Fix mobile intro carousel: sliding-window approach + tighten gap

Switches to a simpler sliding-window carousel (translate the whole box
wrapper rather than individual boxes), which avoids the flash-of-all-boxes
issue. CSS transform:none !important on .intro-box neutralises Webflow's
per-box animations; JS hides the overflow immediately on load to prevent
any visible stacking before setup runs.

Also reduces the gap between the hero h1 and the boxes section by ~20%
via max-height: 80vh on intro-parent-wrapper, which caps the space-between
stretch without breaking the sticky layout.

commit.message:
Apply UI/UX audit findings across main and events pages

Visual encoding:
- Active filter tab: white fill → indigo accent (consistent with all
  other active/interactive states on the page)
- grant-dot: green (#4ade80) → slate-500 (green = free offer type only)
- CAT_PALETTE: remove all 4 offer-type colors so category badges never
  share a hue with an offer pill on the same card
- ORG_PALETTE: remove remote green and countdown amber for same reason

Affordance:
- "Free only" and "Remote only" toggles moved out of the category filter
  bar into the results bar — spatial separation communicates they are
  boolean modifiers, not mutually exclusive selectors
- Benefit cards: underline card name on hover (link affordance)
- Event cards: now fully clickable (data-href + click/keydown handler),
  consistent with main page; underline event name on hover

Layout coherence:
- Events results-bar: add border-bottom + padding-bottom to match main page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove aiohttp dependency — pure Python stdlib

Rewrite server.py and compressor.py to use only Python stdlib:
- http.server + ThreadedHTTPServer for serving
- urllib.request for upstream requests and summarization
- threading for background compression (was asyncio)

No more venv, no more pip install, no more requirements.txt.
Just needs Python 3.7+ which is already on every system.

Hooks simplified: just run `python server.py` directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(FFS-173): Fix clinic notes invisible for accounts without appointment linkage

- Add UNION to person_id query path: also checks ca.resolved_person_id directly
  so accounts with notes but no appointment rows are found (32 accounts affected)
- Add UNION to place_id query path: also checks accounts resolved to people
  linked to that place via sot.person_place
- Add requireValidUUID() validation (Invariant 46)
- Add parsePagination() for limit (Invariant 47)
- Add merged_into_account_id IS NULL filter on all paths

Fixes FFS-173

commit.message:
Fix agent activity panel: remove E2B iptables and relax X-Frame-Options

- Remove iptables network isolation from E2B sandboxes — with the server-side
  agent runtime, sandboxes never make LLM calls directly. The iptables rules
  were blocking E2B's stream/VNC infrastructure, causing "Network access denied
  by ClawVault gateway policy" errors in the agent activity panel.
  Docker sandboxes retain their iptables isolation via entrypoint.sh.
- Change X-Frame-Options from DENY to SAMEORIGIN so the noVNC iframe can load.
- Add missing canAccessAgent check to sandbox warm endpoint.
